title: Joca's New Team
description: A narrative lesson about starting a new job, with introductions, small talk, and professional expectations.
summary_pt_br: Inglês profissional para iniciar emprego: 'I'm excited to join...', 'I look forward to...', linguagem diplomática.

scenes.subtitle_en: A narrative lesson about starting a new job, with introductions, small talk, and professional expectations.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Inglês profissional para iniciar emprego: 'I'm excited to join...', 'I look forward to...', linguagem diplomática.

scenes.text_en: A narrative lesson about starting a new job, with introductions, small talk, and professional expectations. Today's focus: joca's new team. I'm excited to be joining such a talented team.
scenes.text_pt: Inglês profissional para iniciar emprego: 'I'm excited to join...', 'I look forward to...', linguagem diplomática. Foco de hoje: joca's new team. Estou animado em entrar num time tão talentoso.

scenes.title: Joca's New Team
scenes.body_en: Introducing yourself at work: 'I'm excited to be joining...', 'I look forward to...', 'I was hired to...'. Professional softening language.
scenes.body_pt: Inglês profissional para iniciar emprego: 'I'm excited to join...', 'I look forward to...', linguagem diplomática.

examples.en: I'm excited to be joining such a talented team.
examples.pt: Estou animado em entrar num time tão talentoso.

examples.en: I look forward to contributing as soon as possible.
I was hired to lead the mobile engineering squad.
examples.pt: Fui contratado pra liderar o squad mobile.

exercise.question: Complete: "I'm excited to be joining such a ___ team."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I'm excited to be joining such a talented team."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Estou animado em entrar num time tão talentoso.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
I look forward to contributing as soon as possible.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "I look forward to contributing as soon as possible."
Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Joca's New Team — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre joca's new team. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome to the team, Joca. How has your first week been?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It has been intense, but really exciting.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have you met all the stakeholders yet?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am scheduled to meet the rest on Thursday.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What do you think of the codebase so far?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It is larger than I expected but well organized.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What are your priorities for the first month?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I want to ship one small improvement quickly.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Smart approach. A small win builds trust fast.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I look forward to working with the senior engineers.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: They are excited too. Onboarding you was the easy part.

scenes.title: First week at the startup
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe Joca's first impressions and his plan for the first month.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On his fifth day, Joca walked into the standup meeting feeling more confident than the week before.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: I'm excited to be joining such a talented engineering team.

paragraphs.speaker: Manager
paragraphs.en: We hired you to bring fresh perspective. Don't be afraid to challenge our decisions.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: I look forward to shipping my first pull request before the end of the week.

paragraphs.speaker: Colleague
paragraphs.en: If you need anything, just ping me. Onboarding shouldn't feel lonely.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: By Friday, Joca felt less like a visitor and more like a member of the team.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Joca's New Team". A narrative lesson about starting a new job, with introductions, small talk, and professional expectations. I'm excited to be joining such a talented team. I look forward to contributing as soon as possible. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Joca's New Team". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Joca's New Team".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
